input: How do I reset my password?
output: Go to Settings > Security > Reset Password. You'll receive a link via email.

input: Can I export reports as PDF?
output: Yes. Navigate to Reports, click the export button, and select PDF format from the dropdown.

input: The app crashes on login with Android 14
output: This is a known issue. Please update to version 2.3.1 which includes the fix for Android 14 compatibility.

input: How do I add a team member?
output: Go to Team Management > Invite Member. Enter their email and select a role (Admin, Editor, Viewer).

input: What are the API rate limits?
output: Free tier: 100 requests/hour. Pro tier: 1000 requests/hour. Enterprise: custom limits.

input: I was charged twice this month
output: I'm sorry about that. I've verified your account and initiated a refund for the duplicate charge. You'll see it in 3-5 business days.

input: How do I cancel my subscription?
output: Go to Billing > Subscription > Cancel Plan. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period.

input: The CSV export is missing columns
output: This was fixed in v2.2.8. Please update your app. If the issue persists, try clearing your browser cache.

input: Can I use SSO with my company?
output: SSO is available on Enterprise plans. Contact sales@etho.com to set up SAML or OIDC integration.

input: My dashboard shows wrong numbers
output: Dashboard data refreshes every 15 minutes. If numbers seem wrong after that, try force-refreshing with Ctrl+Shift+R.

input: How do I integrate with Slack?
output: Go to Integrations > Slack > Connect. Authorize the app and select which channels to receive notifications in.

input: The mobile app is very slow
output: Try these steps: 1) Update to the latest version, 2) Clear app cache in Settings, 3) Check your network connection.

input: I need to delete my account
output: Go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently removed.

input: Can I get a discount for annual billing?
output: Yes! Annual billing saves 20% compared to monthly. Go to Billing > Change Plan and select the annual option.

input: The search function returns irrelevant results
output: Search index updates hourly. For immediate results, try using specific keywords or filters. We're improving relevance in v2.4.

input: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
output: Go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Scan the QR code with your authenticator app and enter the verification code.

input: My team member can't access the project
output: Check their role in Team Management. Only Admin and Editor roles can access projects. If they're a Viewer, they need to be upgraded.

input: Where can I find the API documentation?
output: Full API docs are at docs.etho.com/api. You can also access them from your dashboard under Developer > API Reference.

input: The webhook is not firing
output: Verify: 1) The endpoint URL is correct and publicly accessible, 2) The webhook is enabled in Settings > Webhooks, 3) Check the delivery logs for errors.

input: Can I customize the notification emails?
output: Yes. Go to Settings > Email Templates. You can customize the header, footer, and content of all transactional emails.
